words.sentenceEn: Jenny was given a head position because she is the best at what she does.

words.sentenceEn: You keep eyeing Will, why? Has he done something to you?

words.sentenceEn: Oh my God, what happened with your hand? It's all swollen.

words.sentenceEn: My heart beats faster when I see him! I don't know if it's love or stress.

words.sentenceEn: He was so rude! No wonder he got slapped in the face!

words.sentenceEn: I can't hear in one ear. It was very loud at the concert yesterday.

words.sentenceEn: Open your mouth and try this cake! It's delicious.

words.sentenceEn: I love your hair! Who's your hairdresser?
words.sentencePl: Uwielbiam Twoje włosy! Gdzie chodzisz do fryzjera?

words.sentenceEn: The dog was lying on its belly.
words.sentencePl: Pies leżał na brzuchu.

words.sentenceEn: I love my body the way it is – I don't need a diet!

words.sentenceEn: Can you roll your tongue? I can't...
words.sentencePl: Umiesz zwinąć język? Ja nie umiem...

words.sentenceEn: I don't know my blood type. Should I?

words.sentenceEn: Penises can come in all sizes and shapes.

words.sentenceEn: A vagina can stretch a lot during childbirth and later go back to its original size.

words.sentenceEn: You have the smoothest skin! Tell me, how do you do this?

words.sentenceEn: You are only 15 years old and already over 7 feet!
words.sentencePl: Masz dopiero 15 lat, a wzrost ponad 7 stóp!

words.sentenceEn: My tooth hurts, but I really don't want to go to the dentist.
words.sentencePl: Boli mnie ząb, ale naprawdę nie chcę iść do dentysty.

words.sentenceEn: I dislocated my shoulder a few weeks ago, and it still hurts.
words.sentencePl: Wybiłem sobie bark kilka tygodni temu i dalej boli.

words.sentenceEn: I haven't noticed you have a scar on your eyebrow before. What happened?
words.sentencePl: Nie zauważyłem wcześniej, że masz bliznę na brwi. Co się stało?

words.sentenceEn: Jim shaved off his beard and he looks like a child now.
words.sentencePl: Jim zgolił brodę i wygląda teraz jak dziecko.

words.sentenceEn: My stomach hurts. I shouldn't have eaten that last slice of pizza.

words.sentenceEn: Every part of my body hurts after that workout.

words.sentenceEn: Daisy slid something gently into Danny's palm. I think they're up to something.

words.sentenceEn: My throat hurts. Do we have anything for it?

words.sentenceEn: Let's give them thumbs up! It's a good video.

words.sentenceEn: I thought I had heart problems, but it was just the muscles in my chest.
words.sentencePl: Myślałem, że mam problemy z sercem, a to były tylko mięśnie klatki piersiowej.

words.sentenceEn: I used to be an adventurer like you. Then I took an arrow to the knee.
words.sentencePl: Kiedyś byłem poszukiwaczem przygód tak jak Ty. Potem dostałem strzałą w kolano.

words.sentenceEn: Have you ever broken a bone? I haven't. I am indestructible.

words.sentenceEn: To have a healthy spine, you have to sit straight.

words.sentenceEn: Why does hitting your elbow hurt so much?
words.sentencePl: Dlaczego uderzenie się w łokieć tak bardzo boli?

words.sentenceEn: I'm not working out with you again. All of my muscles hurt.

words.sentenceEn: Some people don't use their brains as they should...

words.sentenceEn: Stop pointing your finger at me!

words.sentenceEn: Usually, one breast is bigger than the other one.

words.sentenceEn: Move your butt and go swimming with me.

words.sentenceEn: I love horse riding, but I don't know if my ass will ever stop hurting.
words.sentencePl: Kocham jazdę konną, ale nie wiem czy mój tyłek kiedykolwiek przestanie boleć.

words.sentenceEn: What happened to your arm?
words.sentencePl: Co Ci się stało w ramię?

words.sentenceEn: Wait, you have an eyelash on your cheek. Let me take it off for you.

words.sentenceEn: I didn't sleep well, and now my neck hurts.
words.sentencePl: Nie spałem dobrze i teraz boli mnie szyja.

words.sentenceEn: I cut my lip again. Why does it keep happening?

words.sentencePl: Złamałem żebro podczas treningu karate. Musiałem pojechać do szpitala.

words.sentenceEn: I wear a festival bracelet on my wrist the whole time.

words.sentenceEn: Can you name all the organs in the human body?
words.sentencePl: Potrafisz wymienić wszystkie organy w ludzkim ciele?

words.sentenceEn: Everything in your organism seems to be working fine.

words.sentenceEn: Lung transplants are very rare and extremely difficult.

words.sentenceEn: That's a strong heartbeat! Your baby is doing great.

words.sentenceEn: It seemed like he touched my thigh by accident, but I'm not so sure...

words.sentenceEn: Your liver is the only organ that can grow itself back.
words.sentencePl: Wątroba jest jedynym organem, który może odrosnąć.

words.sentenceEn: Sit on your buttocks and eat dinner.

words.sentenceEn: I like learning anatomy and knowing all the parts of my body.

words.sentenceEn: Sugar skulls are an awesome Mexican decoration for Dia de Muertos.

words.sentenceEn: I think I've broken my pinky on that door.
